title: Typee
author: Melville H.
description: Herman Melville (1819–1891) was an American poet and novelist of the American Renaissance, best known for his allusive adventure novel “Moby-Dick”. Mysterious and unpredictable, the “Pierre: or, The Ambiguities” contains all the good and intriguing features of the Gothic iction genre. “Typee” is one of the most famous and critically acclaimed traveling adventures of the nineteenth century.
